description: Vite + React + TypeScript template for Scout Atoms SPA

step-1.title: Research onhyper.io proxy endpoints and integration
notes: Store Scout API key as secret via /api/secrets with name 'scout-atoms'
onhyper.injects stored key and forwards to Scout

step-2.title: Create component catalog with mapping layer

step-3.title: Implement SSE parser and Scout API service

step-4.title: Build atom renderer with component selection

step-5.title: Build proxy layer for onhyper endpoints
notes: getProxyConfig() returns correct config for dev vs prod
Updated scout.ts to use proxy layer
No hardcoded API keys in production build
Dev mode supports direct API key via VITE_SCOUT_API_KEY

step-6.title: Create OpenClaw skill package
notes: SKILL.md with full documentation of stack and commands
Shell script wrapper for all CLI commands
